backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining user profiles, ingredient/category data, and daily record storage with access control checks. Includes legacy and new ingredient lists and exposes profile query/update functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two React stability features to affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing major frontend files, their responsibilities, and recent changes across pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining color tokens in OKLCH for light and dark themes with standardized component variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry template setting up the root element, metadata, and favicon/app icons before loading the React app.
frontend/LIVE_URL.md: Documentation providing the live deployment URL and basic usage instructions for the app.
frontend/PRODUCTION_SMOKE_TEST.md: Comprehensive production smoke test checklist covering connectivity, stability, data entry, history, detail views, copy, and CSV export.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Application root configuring TanStack Router routes and global providers such as ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout with header, navigation, version label, footer, and container wrapping all routed pages.
frontend/src/components/BackendConnectio: UI card that displays backend connection errors, shows troubleshooting steps, and provides a retry button.
frontend/src/config/appVersion.ts: Exports a constant application version number.
Defines ingredient categories, a list of predefined ingredients, and a helper to filter them by category.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on user identity, handling cache invalidation and access initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.t: Provides derived diagnostics for the actor query and a retry method by observing the query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyForm.ts: Manages ingredient form state, updates fields, validates entries, and resets to predefined ingredients.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling identity loading, login, and clearing state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Implements data fetching and mutation hooks for daily records, including record encoding/decoding.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for theming in light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx: Page for entering daily inventory data, validating inputs, saving records, and handling backend connection states.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a list of saved daily records with loading/error handling and navigation to record details.
frontend/src/pages/RecordDetailPage.tsx: Shows details of a specific saved record with options to export CSV, copy text, and handle backend/load errors.
frontend/src/types/dailyForm.ts: Type definitions for ingredient form data, processed entries, and saved daily record structures.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Generates and downloads a CSV file from a saved daily record.
frontend/src/utils/dateFormat.ts: Formats bigint timestamps into dd/mm/yyyy date strings.
frontend/src/utils/recordPlainText.ts: Converts a saved record into vendor-friendly plain text, grouping non‑zero orders by category.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom colors, fonts, animations, and container settings.
project_state.json: Contains project metadata, feature requirements, architectural notes, known issues, and a request to fix the restaurant inventory/order app. Tracks predefined ingredients, UI changes, deployment issues, and history/copy behavior updates.
